name: Tianjin Futong Information Science and Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Tianjin Futong Information Science and Technology Co., Ltd. researches, develops, produces, and supplies optical communication products in China. The company primarily offers optical fiber preforms, optical fibers, and optical cables for national information network construction, backbone information networks, metropolitan area networks, access networks, base stations, indoor distribution, etc. It also researches, designs, develops, and manufactures quartz materials and products, including large optical fiber preform bushing tubes under independent intellectual property rights. The company was formerly known as TIANJIN FUTONG XINMAO SCIENCE&TECHNOLOGY CO.,Ltd. and changed its name to Tianjin Futong Information Science and Technology Co., Ltd. in January 2020. Tianjin Futong Information Science and Technology Co., Ltd. was founded in 1997 and is based in Tianjin, China.
